text:

Author: araujo

Log:
  Add an option called "random" that combined with "ether" can generate a
  random MAC address for an Ethernet interface.

  PR:		211984
  Submitted by:	pi@
  Reviewed by:	gnn, cem, jhb, lidl, rpokala, wblock
  Approved by:	wblock (manpages)
